member.name: T:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController
member.summary: Exposes /api/v1/payments endpoints for processing payments, retrieving payment records, refunds, and status updates.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.Process(QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.ProcessPaymentRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/v1/payments/process - process a payment for an order.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetByOrder(System.Guid)
member.summary: GET /api/v1/payments/byOrder/{orderId} - fetch the payment for an order.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetByCustomer(System.Guid)
member.summary: GET /api/v1/payments/byCustomer/{customerId} - all payments by a customer.

member.name: T:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController
member.summary: Exposes /api/v1/wallet endpoints for balance retrieval, top-ups, paying for orders from the wallet, and statement retrieval.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController.GetBalance(System.Guid)
member.summary: GET /api/v1/wallet/balance/{customerId} - get the customer's wallet balance.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController.AddToWallet(QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.AddToWalletRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/v1/wallet/addToWallet - top up the customer's wallet.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController.PayFromWallet(QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.PayFromWalletRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/v1/wallet/payFromWallet - pay for an order from the wallet balance.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController.GetStatements(System.Guid)
member.summary: GET /api/v1/wallet/statements/{customerId} - get the customer's wallet ledger.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
